import math

def compute_distances(points_a, points_b):
    results = []
    sqrt = math.sqrt
    for pa in points_a:
        coords_a = pa.coordinates
        for pb in points_b:
            coords_b = pb.coordinates
            dx = coords_a[0] - coords_b[0]
            dy = coords_a[1] - coords_b[1]
            dist = sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy)
            results.append(dist)
    return results

def apply_transforms(matrix, vectors):
    output = []
    data = matrix.data
    bias = matrix.bias
    for v in vectors:
        for i in range(len(v)):
            v[i] = data[i] * v[i] + bias[i]
        output.append(v)
    return output
